March 30, 2026

Anthropic principle

Is using our own existence as a basis for constructing physical theories merely sophistry, or can it genuinely advance the development of science? The anthropic principle usually appears together with the naturalness problem. There are many different formulations of the anthropic principle. The version often used for “sophistry” is: the universe must exist in its...
